description_long: This is a modern, compact two-seater sofa with a boxy silhouette and clean lines, upholstered in a dark, solid-colored fabric. The sofa features two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all appearing to be well-padded for comfort. The armrests are straight, broad, and at the same height as the backrest, giving the sofa a sturdy and symmetrical appearance. The base of the sofa is low to the ground, with short, block-style legs that are only subtly visible. The upholstery is smooth and matte, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching, emphasizing a minimalist aesthetic. This sofa would be suitable for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, waiting areas, or outdoor covered spaces.
description: A modern, boxy two-seater sofa with dark, smooth upholstery, straight armrests, and large, uniform cushions. Its minimalist design and solid color make it suitable for contemporary urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing two large seat and back cushions, straight armrests, and the sofa's symmetrical, boxy shape.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the straight, padded armrest and the thickness of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, flat backrest and the sofa's solid, unadorned back panel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the straight armrest and cushion profile seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, uniform seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, all loose and evenly placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, broad armrests at seat height, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's boxy profile, with no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs positioned at the corners, minimally visible and likely made of wood or plastic, with a recessed appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight backrest with two large, loose cushions, continuous and unsegmented, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, dark-colored fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
